rule: Official SEC EDGAR Form 4 filings for the approved five-symbol universe only.
Open-market purchase transactions only: transaction code P and acquired/disposed code A.
At least two distinct reporting owners disclosed within 10 calendar days.
Cluster aggregate disclosed purchase value must be at least 100000 USD.
Enter long at the first available daily open after the cluster signal filing date and exit at the close 90 trading sessions later.
Subtract 500 bps round trip cost from every completed trade.
Archive unless at least 5 completed trades exist in this restricted five-symbol panel.
Archive if positive net performance flips nonpositive after removing the top 3 net trades.
Candidate-only at best; strategy promotion is blocked regardless of result.
